top3.sql:
SELECT name, totalSetSize
FROM sets
WHERE code IN (
    SELECT setCode 
    FROM set_translations 
    WHERE language = 'Russian'
)
ORDER BY totalSetSize DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT name, totalSetSize
FROM sets
WHERE code IN (
    SELECT setCode 
    FROM set_translations 
    WHERE language = 'Russian'
)
ORDER BY totalSetSize DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.name, COUNT(c.id) AS card_count
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
LEFT JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Russian'
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY card_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT name, totalSetSize
FROM sets
WHERE code IN (
    SELECT setCode 
    FROM set_translations 
    WHERE language = 'Russian'
)
ORDER BY totalSetSize DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.name, COUNT(c.id) AS card_count
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
LEFT JOIN cards c ON s.code = c.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Russian'
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY card_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.name, s.totalSetSize
FROM sets s
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE st.language = 'Russian'
GROUP BY s.code, s.name, s.totalSetSize
ORDER BY s.totalSetSize DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT name, totalSetSize
FROM sets
WHERE code IN (
    SELECT setCode 
    FROM set_translations 
    WHERE language = 'Russian'
)
ORDER BY totalSetSize DESC
LIMIT 1;
